summary: Comprehensive testing of Lefteria FC football club website. Backend: 34/34 tests passed. Frontend: All 7 public pages and 11 admin tabs working. Fixed Academy page API endpoint bug.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Academy page was calling /api/academy instead of /api/academy-groups
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed API endpoint from /api/academy to /api/academy-groups and /api/players?is_academy=true to /api/players?team_type=Academy

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Backend has 34 comprehensive API tests covering all CRUD operations. Frontend has all 7 public pages (Home, About, Team, Academy, Fixtures, News, Contact) and 11 admin tabs (Dashboard, Club Profile, Players, Academy, Staff, Fixtures, Standings, News, Venues, Seasons, Messages) working correctly. LEFTERIA FC is highlighted in orange in fixtures and standings. All text is in Greek.

public_pages.homepage: Hero, fixtures, standings table, news, academy CTA - all working
public_pages.team_page: 20 players with position filters (All, Goalkeeper, Defender, Midfielder, Forward) - working
public_pages.academy_page: 4 academy groups (U12, U14, U16, U18) from /api/academy-groups - working after fix
public_pages.fixtures_page: Filters (All/Scheduled/Completed) working, LEFTERIA FC highlighted in orange

admin_panel.players_tab: List with team type badges, Add/Edit/Delete working
admin_panel.fixtures_tab: CRUD with scores and status working

api_endpoints.GET /api/players: Returns 20 players with is_active, team_type fields
